assertions.title: Heatmap overlay toggle with multiple modes

steps.action: Open Org Chart default state after login
steps.observed: Overlay button displayed as "Overlay" and legend count was 0

steps.expected: Modes include Salary Band, Tenure, Department, Employment Type, Status (plus Off)
steps.observed: Menu showed Off, Salary Band, Tenure, Department, Employment Type, Status

assertions.title: Overlay colors nodes by selected data dimension

steps.action: Switch overlays across Salary Band, Tenure, Department, Employment Type, Status
steps.observed: Overlay button and node colors changed per mode

steps.action: Validate representative color mappings in DOM
steps.expected: Salary/Tenure gradients, categorical distinct colors, gray for missing salary
steps.observed: Salary: CEO #ef4444, manager #f3831c, no-salary employee #d1d5db; Tenure: long-tenure hotter than recent; Department/Employment Type/Status used distinct categorical colors and legends

assertions.title: Heatmap legend displays when overlay is active

steps.expected: Gradient legend with min/max labels appears
steps.observed: Legend title "Salary Band" with min $70,000 and max $300,000 displayed
Categorical legend rendered with department swatches

assertions.title: Overlay does not break node interactions

steps.action: Keep overlay active and click manager card
steps.observed: Detail panel opened while salary overlay remained active

steps.action: Use chart controls and drag gestures with overlay active
steps.observed: Zoom In changed viewport transform from matrix(0.302837...) to matrix(0.363404...); middle-mouse pan changed translation from -7.66809 to -187.668

steps.action: Switch overlay mode while chart is active
steps.observed: Manager card color changed from department #14b8a6 to salary #f3831c immediately after mode switch

steps.action: Open Span of Control panel from sidebar
steps.expected: Panel lists managers with name/title/report count/ratio
steps.observed: Panel rendered with 3 managers and ratio strings (e.g., Maya Overload 10 direct reports · 1:10; Casey Chief 1:2; Uma Underutilized 1:1)

steps.action: Inspect Span of Control panel flagging
steps.expected: Managers >8 reports flagged overloaded; managers <2 reports flagged underutilized
steps.observed: Maya Overload flagged Overloaded with count 10; Uma Underutilized flagged Underutilized with count 1; panel summary showed Overloaded=1 and Underutilized=1

steps.expected: Warning indicators optionally shown on nodes
steps.observed: Maya node showed "10 reports" overloaded badge; Uma node showed "1 report" underutilized badge

assertions.title: Span-of-control data accuracy matches org chart

steps.action: Cross-reference Maya Overload count between panel and org chart
steps.expected: Panel report count equals visible org chart child count
steps.observed: Panel count for Maya = 10 and org chart badge = "10 reports" (match)

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log did not include HTTP status codes directly.
frictions.resolution: Validated the same observed API reads via authenticated curl calls to capture explicit 200 statuses.

frictions.description: Annotated span panel screenshots surfaced only a subset of rows as interactive refs.
frictions.resolution: Used panel data-testid DOM extraction to verify all manager rows, flags, and ratios (overloaded/healthy/underutilized) were present.

summary: Tested 7 assertions (VAL-AV-005 through VAL-AV-011): 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
